title: Syniscopy: Theoretical Foundations and Cross-Modality Cramér-Rao Analysis for Synthetic Single-Particle Microscopy
description: Physics-based synthetic single-particle microscopy simulator with matched cross-modality Cramér-Rao diagnostics, supervision masks, paired modality-comparison outputs, and Segment Anything Model 2 starter workflows.
notes: The MIT license applies to Syniscopy code and documentation. Third-party media and model assets are not relicensed as Syniscopy code. Liverpool caustic-video review manifests identify Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 third-party DataCat sources; the source release does not bundle raw DataCat videos, regenerated reviewed clip AVIs, or derived overlays. Segment Anything Model 2 code, base checkpoints, and any fine-tuned checkpoint derived from those weights retain Meta's upstream Segment Anything Model 2 licenses and notices.
